blue_oceans.notes: 985K community. No app gamifies the daily knife skills habit (one cutting technique drilled to precision, one mise en place challenge, one speed improvement tracked) with streak XP, brunoise/julienne/chiffonade badge gates, and professional knife station level progression.

1.3M community. No gamified daily fermentation streak app. Gap: one technique practiced daily (SCOBY care, brine adjustment, pH check, new batch started) with XP per ferment type, wild culture mastery badges, and fermentation artisan level gates.

885K community. No app gamifies the daily wok cooking habit (one stir-fry at blast heat, one tossing technique practiced, one seasoning balance calibrated) with streak XP, wok hei mastery badges, and professional Chinese chef level gates.

263K community. Smaller but zero competition. No app gamifies the daily dumpling habit (one new pleat pattern, one dough type practiced, one filling balanced) with streak XP and dim sum artisan level gates.

530K community. Tutorial apps like Wilton exist but no app gamifies the daily cake decorating habit (one piping technique drilled, one fondant skill practiced, one new design element mastered) with streak XP, technique badge collection, and professional cake artist level gates.

1.38M community. No app gamifies the daily pastry habit (one lamination fold set, one pate choux piped, one tart shell technique practiced) with streak XP, French pastry skill level gates, and Cordon Bleu-tier achievement badges.

605K community. No app gamifies the daily cookie decorating habit (one flooding technique to consistency standard, one detail piping element mastered, one color theory application) with streak XP, royal icing technique badges, and cookie artist level gates.

453K community. No app gamifies the daily chocolate making habit (one tempering attempt logged with snap/bloom/gloss grade, one ganache flavor created, one molded bonbon completed) with streak XP, couverture mastery badges, and master chocolatier level gates.

547K community. Apps are symptom trackers for managing disease, not positive habit streaks. No app gamifies the daily gut health habit (one fermented food consumed, one prebiotic fiber added, one mindful meal) with streak XP, microbiome diversity score, and gut health level gates.

1.35M community. Daily Dozen is a checklist, not streak gamification. No app gamifies the daily anti-inflammatory habit (one omega-3-rich meal, one refined sugar replacement, one polyphenol food added) with streak XP, inflammation score progression, and functional nutrition badge levels.

1.68M community. FOK is a meal planner, Daily Dozen is a checklist. No app gamifies the daily plant-based cooking habit (one whole-food substitution mastered, one legume preparation practiced, one oil-free technique completed) with streak XP, whole food chef badge collection, and plant-based cooking level gates.

3.48M community. Highest community total in meal prep scanning. Mealime and Prepear are planning tools, not streak gamification. No app gamifies the daily batch cooking habit (one complete protein batch, one carb prep, one veggie roast, containers portioned) with streak XP, meal prep efficiency scoring, and batch cooking level gates.

1.14M community. No app gamifies the daily freezer meal habit (one batch assembled and frozen, one rotation check, one new freezer-friendly technique practiced) with streak XP, freezer inventory badge system, and freezer meal chef level gates.

occupied.notes: 1.47M community. MFP, Cronometer, MacroFactor all have streak-adjacent tracking. Gap exists for a gamified MACRO LEARNING streak (daily XP for precision macro splits, nutrition knowledge quizzes, protein completeness badges) distinct from passive tracking. MFP brand dominance makes this harder. SOFT_COMPETITION — viable if positioned as macro education not tracking.
